name: Pumpkin Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: Egg replacer for 2 eggs (I used Eggbeaters, but one could try a vegan substitute instead)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix the pumpkin and brown sugar.
2. Beat in the egg substitute.
3. Gradually mix in the flour, baking soda, and spices.
4. Mix in the oatmeal and raisins.
5. Drop by spoonfuls onto a non-stick or oil-sprayed cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 10-20 minutes.
